outcome_statement: A single shared DateSelector component in common/ replaces all 5 variants. Access-level and quick-range differences are parameterised. All 5 callers are migrated. Existing tests pass.
why: 5 copies of the same component meant any date selector bug or UI change required 5 coordinated edits. Bugs had already diverged (inline vs popup calendar, inconsistent DayPicker color tokens).
